title: Banner Pattern Backport+ (BPB+)
description: Backports 1.21.2 Banner Pattern items & adds compatibility with some mods.
body: This pack backports the vanilla Banner Pattern item textures from 1.21.2; and changes those of [Gipples Galore](https://modrinth.com/mod/gipples-galore), [Spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum), [Twilight Forest](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-twilight-forest-unofficial), and [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) to match.
